lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.KmsK.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Key Management Service key for encrypting audio log files stored in an S3 bucket.

lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.LogP.Docs: The S3 prefix to assign to audio log files.

lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.S3Bu.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an Amazon S3 bucket where audio log files are stored.
